description_long: This is a two-story suburban house situated on a large grassy lot with a paved driveway leading up to the main entrance. The house features a prominent gable roof with dark shingles and a light-colored exterior, likely finished in siding or stucco. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns, and multiple windows are symmetrically arranged across both stories. The side and rear views reveal additional windows and a secondary structure, possibly a garage or extension, attached to the main building. The property is surrounded by open lawn, with no visible fencing or landscaping details. The overall design is reminiscent of modern American residential architecture, blending functional and aesthetic elements.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, light exterior, and a covered front porch, set on a spacious grassy lot with a driveway. Symmetrical windows and a secondary attached structure are visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, and the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the attached secondary structure and several windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, additional windows, and the continuation of the driveway.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the house's side profile, more windows, and the connection between the main building and the secondary structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, single main door, and steps leading up from the driveway
